ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Continued To Dec-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rafael Pacquing for Michael Lane Yakuma (Administrator).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's Notes. He will file a supplement to the petition and waiver of account. The matter was continued to December 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal, And Petition For Final Distribution (Per P.M.)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal, And Petition For Final Distribution (Per P.M.)
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rafael Pacquing for Michael Yakuma (Petitioner/Administrator).

Mr. Pacquing stated that they filed the Inventory and Appraisal two weeks ago, that they sent the required notices to the Franchise Tax Board and that they were working on obtaining waivers from the Distributees including the Administrator's Stepmother. In addition, he stated that they were drafting the Petition for Final Distribution as we speak and that he expected to have the petition filed on or before four months after notice was sent to the Franchise Tax Board. The matter was continued to July 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Petition for Final Distribution or a Probate Code 12200 petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal, And Petition For Final Distribution (Per P.M.)
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Continued To Mar-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rafael Pacquing for Michael Yakuma (Administrator).

Mr. Pacquing stated that he received the inventory yesterday and that he anticipated Mr. Yakuma signing it later this week. The matter was continued to March 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the petition for final distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
